title: Death Sound Plugin | UnstableSMP | Orbital Strikes
description: Death Sound Plugin like on the UnstableSMP with many features like Orbital Strikes and more
body:
# Update in the next few days! in the time range of 01.07-1.08 (nickname not showing in nametag fix)
# UnstableSMPDeathSound

UnstableSMPDeathSound is an all-in-one survival utility plugin for modern Minecraft servers. It combines death effects, chat control, nickname and skin tools, creator utilities, and custom SMP features into one plugin.

Built for modern server software, it supports Folia, Paper, Purpur, Bukkit and Spigot.

For Nuke & Stab to correctly work set **max tnt per tick** to: **100000** in spigot.yml

Originally made as a death sound plugin, it has grown into a larger SMP utility plugin with gameplay tools, quality-of-life systems, and admin controls for custom survival servers.

## Features

- Custom death sounds with configurable volume, pitch, and range
- Proximity-based join, quit, death, and chat systems
- Chat controls for normal, disabled, and proximity chat
- Death punishment options such as normal, kick, or ban
- Nickname and skin commands with random nick and random skin support
- Immortal player management with saved data and reload support
- Fast regen and anti armor break toggles
- Record mode, freeze, optimization, and keep-inventory utilities
- Orbital strikes, fishing rod systems, and mafia tag features
- In-game management commands for easier setup and control

## Why Use It

Instead of installing multiple smaller plugins, UnstableSMPDeathSound gives you one plugin that handles survival events, player identity tools, staff utilities, creator features, and custom SMP mechanics and more in one place.

It is built for servers that want more control over player experience, custom events, and special gameplay systems without splitting everything across separate plugins.
